name: caveman
install_doc: README: `curl -fsSL .../install.sh | bash`. THOL runs the same Node installer pinned to v1.9.0 for Claude Code: `npx -y github:JuliusBrussee/caveman#v1.9.0 -- --only claude --with-init` (drops the skill + SessionStart hook into the sandbox config).
notes: A Claude Code skill + SessionStart hook that makes the agent answer in 'caveman' style (drops filler words) to cut OUTPUT tokens. No MCP, no bash-output wrapper; activated per-session by a hook + the /caveman slash command. Whether terser prose actually preserves answer quality is exactly what this benchmark measures.
